RemediationStrings.Title: DisableWebPnPDownload (Administrative Templates - Printers)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows NT\Printers\DisableWebPnPDownload must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - Printers.

RemediationStrings.Title: RedirectionGuardPolicy (Administrative Templates - Printers)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows NT\Printers\RedirectionGuardPolicy must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - Printers.

RemediationStrings.Title: CopyFilesPolicy (Administrative Templates - Printers)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows NT\Printers\CopyFilesPolicy must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - Printers.

RemediationStrings.Title: RestrictDriverInstallationToAdministrators (Administrative Templates - Printers)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows NT\Printers\PointAndPrint\RestrictDriverInstallationToAdministrators must be 1. Severity: High. Category: Administrative Templates - Printers.

RemediationStrings.Title: RpcUseNamedPipeProtocol (Administrative Templates - Printers)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows NT\Printers\RPC\RpcUseNamedPipeProtocol must be 0. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - Printers.

RemediationStrings.Title: RpcAuthentication (Administrative Templates - Printers)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows NT\Printers\RPC\RpcAuthentication must be 0. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - Printers.

RemediationStrings.Title: RpcProtocols (Administrative Templates - Printers)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows NT\Printers\RPC\RpcProtocols must be 5. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - Printers.

RemediationStrings.Title: ForceKerberosForRpc (Administrative Templates - Printers)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows NT\Printers\RPC\ForceKerberosForRpc must be 0. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - Printers.

RemediationStrings.Title: RpcTcpPort (Administrative Templates - Printers)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows NT\Printers\RPC\RpcTcpPort must be 0. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - Printers.

RemediationStrings.Title: RpcAuthnLevelPrivacyEnabled (Administrative Templates - Printers)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Print\RpcAuthnLevelPrivacyEnabled must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - Printers.
